Send HSTS (max-age>=31536000; includeSubDomains) over HTTPS to force secure
Response from http://localhost:8081 did not include 'X-Frame-Options'.
Set X-Frame-Options: DENY (or a frame-ancestors CSP) to prevent clickjacking.
Response from http://localhost:8081 did not include 'X-Content-Type-Options'.
Set X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff to stop MIME-type sniffing.
Response from http://localhost:8081 did not include 'Referrer-Policy'.
Set Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin to limit referrer leakage.
